style: hand-coloured cartographic plate, muted ink, period-appropriate

images.prompt: Wide bay at Aulis packed with low black-hulled Mycenaean galleys, sails furled, smoke from an altar on the headland; hand-coloured cartographic plate, sepia + umber.
Forested island of Tenedos seen from the sea, beached ships on the strand, cookfire smoke; hand-coloured cartographic plate, weathered antique palette.
Citadel of Troy (Hisarlık) on a low mound, cyclopean walls, the Trojan plain with Scamander and Simois rivers beyond, distant beached ships; hand-coloured cartographic plate, ochre + slate.
